Associate.title: Associate Expense Policy
Associate.policy:
ASSOCIATE EXPENSE POLICY

1. MEALS & DINING
   - Meals under $30: No receipt required
   - Meals $30-$50: Receipt required, no alcohol
   - Meals over $50: Not permitted
   - Only casual dining establishments (Chipotle, Panera, Subway, etc.)
   - No fine dining or upscale restaurants
   - Coffee and casual meals fully reimbursable within limits

2. TRAVEL
   - Hotels: Maximum $120 per night (tax included)
   - Ground transportation: Uber/Lyft/taxi acceptable up to $25 per trip
   - Flights: Coach/economy class only, max $400 per flight
   - Rental cars: Not permitted - use rideshare instead
   - Mileage reimbursement: $0.58 per mile for personal vehicle use

3. OFFICE SUPPLIES & EQUIPMENT
   - Office supplies: Reimbursable up to $100 per purchase
   - Computer equipment: Must be pre-approved by manager
   - Furniture: Not reimbursable

4. PROHIBITED CATEGORIES
   - Personal shopping (clothing, accessories, home goods)
   - Luxury brand purchases (Louis Vuitton, Gucci, Chanel, designer goods, etc.)
   - Groceries or household items (Whole Foods, Target, etc.)
   - Personal care (gym, haircuts, medical, pharmacy)
   - Parking violations or traffic tickets
   - Personal entertainment

5. DOCUMENTATION REQUIREMENTS
   - Receipts required for all expenses over $25
   - Business purpose must be documented
   - For meals: Include attendees and business purpose
   - For travel: Include trip dates and business destination

6. DUPLICATE SUBMISSIONS
   - Strictly prohibited
   - Duplicates or suspicious patterns result in disciplinary action

7. MONTHLY LIMIT
   - Maximum $2,000 per month in total expenses

Manager.title: Manager Expense Policy
Manager.policy:
MANAGER EXPENSE POLICY

1. MEALS & DINING
   - Meals under $50: No receipt required
   - Meals $50-$150: Receipt required with business purpose
   - Meals over $150: Not permitted
   - Casual and mid-range restaurants permitted (Chipotle, Panera, Ruth's Chris within limits)
   - No luxury fine dining or high-end establishments beyond approved restaurants
   - No alcohol for personal meals
   - Client entertainment meals up to $150 with attendee documentation (alcohol $10 max per person)

2. TRAVEL
   - Hotels: Maximum $200 per night (tax included)
   - Ground transportation: Uber/Lyft/taxi acceptable up to $50 per trip
   - Rental cars: Not permitted
   - Flights: Coach/economy class only, max $450 per flight
   - Mileage reimbursement: $0.58 per mile for personal vehicle use
   - Parking and tolls: Reimbursable with receipt

3. OFFICE SUPPLIES & EQUIPMENT
   - Office supplies: Reimbursable up to $200 per purchase
   - Computer equipment: Reimbursable up to $1,000
   - Furniture: Not reimbursable

4. PROHIBITED CATEGORIES
   - Personal shopping (clothing, accessories, home goods)
   - Luxury brand purchases (Louis Vuitton, Gucci, Chanel, designer goods, etc.)
   - Groceries or household items (Whole Foods, Target, etc.)
   - Personal care (gym, haircuts, medical, pharmacy)
   - Parking violations or traffic tickets
   - Personal entertainment

5. DOCUMENTATION REQUIREMENTS
   - Receipts required for all expenses over $40
   - Business purpose must be documented
   - For meals: Include attendees and business purpose
   - For travel: Include trip dates and business destination

6. DUPLICATE SUBMISSIONS
   - Strictly prohibited
   - Duplicates or suspicious patterns result in disciplinary action

7. MONTHLY LIMIT
   - Maximum $5,000 per month in total expenses

VP.title: VP Expense Policy
VP.policy:
VP EXPENSE POLICY

1. MEALS & DINING
   - Meals under $75: No receipt required
   - Meals $75-$300: Receipt required with business purpose
   - Meals over $300: Not permitted
   - Mid-range and upscale restaurants permitted for business dinners (Ruth's Chris, Four Seasons, Nobu within limits)
   - No luxury fine dining beyond these approved restaurants
   - Client entertainment meals up to $250 with attendee documentation (alcohol $15 max per person)
   - Team meals for strategic purposes: Up to $400 per event

2. TRAVEL
   - Hotels: Maximum $300 per night (tax included)
   - Ground transportation: Uber/Lyft/taxi acceptable up to $75 per trip
   - Rental cars: Not permitted
   - Flights: Coach/economy class only, max $650 per flight
   - Mileage reimbursement: $0.58 per mile for personal vehicle use
   - Parking, tolls, and valet: Fully reimbursable with receipt

3. OFFICE SUPPLIES & EQUIPMENT
   - Office supplies: Reimbursable up to $500 per purchase
   - Computer equipment: Reimbursable up to $3,000
   - Furniture: Up to $1,000 for office improvements
   - Software subscriptions: Reimbursable with business justification

4. PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT
   - Conference attendance: Registration fees and travel reimbursable
   - Training and certifications: Up to $2,000 per year

5. PROHIBITED CATEGORIES
   - Personal shopping (clothing, accessories, home goods)
   - Luxury brand purchases (Louis Vuitton, Gucci, Chanel, designer goods, etc.)
   - Groceries or household items
   - Personal care (gym, haircuts, medical, pharmacy)
   - Parking violations or traffic tickets
   - Personal entertainment

6. DOCUMENTATION REQUIREMENTS
   - Receipts required for all expenses over $75
   - Business purpose must be documented
   - For meals: Include attendees and business purpose
   - For travel: Include trip dates and business destination
   - For entertainment: Document business benefit

7. DUPLICATE SUBMISSIONS
   - Strictly prohibited
   - Duplicates or suspicious patterns result in disciplinary action

8. MONTHLY LIMIT
   - Maximum $10,000 per month in total expenses
